_publications._publicationTitle: Synergistic effect of Nutlin-3 combined with MG-132 on schwannoma cells through restoration of merlin and p53 tumour suppressors.

_contextSnippet: MG-132 amplified the inhibitory effect of Nutlin-3 on schwannoma cell proliferation, and MG-132 narrowed the differences in the sensitivity to Nutlin-3 between cultures with different merlin expression status
details: Amplified the inhibitory effect of Nutlin-3 on schwannoma cell proliferation and narrowed differences in sensitivity between cultures with different merlin expression status
